Condition Not Satisfied.
Varga chathushtaya condition is that at least 2 of the 4
conditions should be satisfied. This BT is OK in that sense,
=
and for sure BT Sh 27' 02" AM is a sure choice.
It is clear that both the BTs Sh 00' 52" AM and Sh 27' 02"
AM well qualifies to be the BT. It is just natural, as Varga
Chathushtaya method checks only for the possible moments
at which a birth could take place. But still our question is, of

Birth Time Rectification Example (Case Study) 99
these 2, which one is your BT? Based on the earlier support
of the Navamsa characteristics described in Saravali, I should
support the use ofBT = Sh 27' 02" AM (instead of Sh 00' 52"
AM). But now casting the chart with Sh 00' 52" AM as BT I
could see that it falls in the 7th Navamsa of Cp. As per
Saravali, one born in the 7th Navamsa of Cp would be, "Lazy,
medium color, knows well to speak according to the situation,
plump figure, strong, soft hands and feet, good character and
calm intellect".
